question: Count the number of United Airlines flights that arrive in Aberdeen.
gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRPORTS AS T2 ON T1.DestAirport  =  T2.AirportCode JOIN AIRLINES AS T3 ON T3.uid  =  T1.Airline WHERE T2.City  =  "Aberdeen" AND T3.Airline  =  "United Airlines"
gold_sql_original: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRPORTS AS T2 ON T1.DestAirport  =  T2.AirportCode JOIN AIRLINES AS T3 ON T3.uid  =  T1.Airline WHERE T2.City  =  "Aberdeen" AND T3.Airline  =  "United Airlines"
gold_sql_canonical: SELECT count(*) FROM flights AS T1 JOIN airports AS T2 ON T1.DestAirport  =  T2.AirportCode JOIN airlines AS T3 ON T3.uid  =  T1.Airline WHERE T2.City  =  "Aberdeen" AND T3.Airline  =  "United Airlines"
agent_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS flight_count FROM flights JOIN airlines ON flights.Airline = airlines.uid JOIN airports ON flights.DestAirport = airports.AirportCode WHERE airlines.Airline = 'United Airlines' AND airports.City = 'Aberdeen' LIMIT 100
safe_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS flight_count FROM flights JOIN airlines ON flights.Airline = airlines.uid JOIN airports ON flights.DestAirport = airports.AirportCode WHERE airlines.Airline = 'United Airlines' AND airports.City = 'Aberdeen' LIMIT 100
agent_answer: There are 0 United Airlines flights that arrive in Aberdeen.
